description: VERIFIED LIVE: SoundCloud via your logged-in session (session bridge — no token to paste). Your profile and your library work on api-v2.soundcloud.com; the oauth_token cookie is forwarded as an 'Authorization: OAuth <token>' header by the content-script bridge. Tested live by Claude Code against a logged-in account: /me and /me/library/all both returned 200 with real data.

tools.name: soundcloud_me
tools.description: Your SoundCloud profile (username, followers, track count). VERIFIED.

tools.name: soundcloud_library
tools.description: Your library: liked tracks, playlists and reposts. VERIFIED.
